report.summary: Researched Aave v4 (targeting Q2 2026 mainnet launch) and built a comprehensive guide covering the Hub & Spoke architecture, GHO stablecoin, Horizon institutional markets, v3 vs v4 comparison, AAVE tokenomics, and an interactive AaveV4SpokesExplorer client component.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Identified Aave v4 as a high-value content gap — not covered in any existing /learn/ page
Aave v4 mainnet launch targeting Q2 2026; team calls it 'the most significant architectural evolution since V1'
Core innovation: Hub & Spoke architecture replaces isolated v3 markets with a Unified Liquidity Hub per chain
Aave TVL reached $75B at peak 2025; holds ~65% DeFi lending market share
GHO stablecoin supply grew to ~$500M in 2025, generating $14M+ annualized DAO revenue
Horizon institutional market launched August 2025 — $580M+ deposits; partners: Franklin Templeton, VanEck, Circle, Ripple
AAVE token: ~$190 price, ~$3B market cap, 16M fixed supply, $100-120M annualized protocol revenue
V4 key features: ERC-4626 share accounting, dynamic risk premiums, fuzzy liquidation engine, gas efficiency improvements
Considered Sui Network DeFi as second topic; deferred — strong data but Aave v4 has higher immediate search intent

sections.title: Content Created
items: ~3,200-word learn guide: 'Aave v4: The Complete Guide to DeFi's Biggest Lending Upgrade in 2026'
10 sections: What Is Aave, Why v4, Hub & Spoke Architecture, Key Features, GHO Stablecoin, Horizon Institutional, v3 vs v4 Comparison, AAVE Token & Tokenomics, Risks, FAQ
6-question FAQ section targeting People Also Ask queries
Hub & Spoke architecture diagram (visual grid layout in JSX)
v3 vs v4 comparison table (9 features)
GHO stablecoin comparison table (5 stablecoins)
6 AAVE token metric cards (price, market cap, supply, revenue, TVL, market share)
5 risk panels with color-coded severity indicators
5 feature detail cards for v4 key changes
5 internal links to related degen0x learn pages

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Title tag: 'Aave v4 Explained 2026 — Hub & Spoke Architecture | degen0x' (59 chars)
Primary keyword: 'aave v4' placed at title start
Meta description: 156 chars — specific data points, primary keyword, clear value prop
OpenGraph type: article with publishedTime and modifiedTime set
Twitter card: summary_large_image configured
10 keywords array targeting 'aave v4', 'aave hub and spoke', 'GHO stablecoin', 'aave v4 vs v3', 'defi lending 2026'
Article JSON-LD schema with wordCount, author, dates via generateArticleSchema()
FAQ JSON-LD schema for 6 questions via generateFAQSchema() — targets featured snippets and People Also Ask
Schemas combined via combineSchemas() and rendered via StructuredData component

sections.title: Interactive Component
items: AaveV4SpokesExplorer.tsx — client component embedded in the Hub & Spoke section
4-tab explorer showing all Spoke types: Stablecoin, ETH Derivatives, High-Risk Assets, Horizon (KYC)
Each Spoke shows: risk badge, TVL target, description, supported assets grid, key features list, best-for summary
Dynamic border and tab highlight color based on active Spoke's risk level
KYC badge indicator on the Horizon (permissioned) Spoke tab
Zero external dependencies — pure React state with inline CSS matching site dark theme
TypeScript clean — no errors in new files confirmed via tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck
